Description: Remove 'ส่งงานล่าช้า' and 'ปิดรับงาน' from the status filter dropdown.
Instruction: Remove the options for 'late' and 'closed' from assignment-filter-status.
ReplacementContent:
<select id="assignment-filter-status" class="form-input" onchange="renderAssignmentsList()" style="flex:1; min-width:180px;">
                                <option value="all">ทุกสถานะ</option>
                                <option value="published">เผยแพร่</option>
                                <option value="draft">ร่าง</option>
                            </select>
TargetContent:
<select id="assignment-filter-status" class="form-input" onchange="renderAssignmentsList()" style="flex:1; min-width:180px;">
                                <option value="all">ทุกสถานะ</option>
                                <option value="published">เผยแพร่</option>
                                <option value="draft">ร่าง</option>
                                <option value="late">ส่งงานล่าช้า</option>
                                <option value="closed">ปิดรับงาน</option>
                            </select>
toolAction: Remove status filter options from HTML
